content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium video hero, landing page opening, SaaS homepage hero, portfolio first screen, cinematic product website, app launch page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

Visual traits:
- multiple hero composition models instead of one centered template
- full-screen video with readable content layers
- top-aligned campaign pressure
- bottom-left film poster composition
- centered SaaS/app video hero
- two-panel Liquid Glass split hero
- technical education HLS hero
- strict grayscale Liquid Glass hero

Use when:
- premium video hero
- landing page opening
- SaaS homepage hero
- portfolio first screen
- cinematic product website
- app launch page

Avoid when:
- dashboard or persistent workspace UI
- complex console or dense form workflow
- video without readability checks
- forcing desktop navigation into mobile
- mixing too many CTA systems
- random decorative information clusters
- full-line gradient headlines when single accent punctuation is enough

AI summary: Premium video hero layout system for landing page, SaaS homepage, portfolio first screen, app launch, and cinematic product websites. Choose a composition model before coding: top-aligned campaign, bottom-left poster, MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, two-panel Liquid Glass, technical education HLS, or strict grayscale glass. Includes video layer, typography, CTA, nav, mobile menu, overlays, and information clusters.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium video hero, landing page opening, SaaS homepage hero, portfolio first screen, cinematic product website, app launch page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Choose a clear hero composition model before coding.
- Do not default every hero to centered text.
- Top-aligned cinematic hero uses min-h-screen, large top padding, giant uppercase type, tight line-height, and campaign CTA.
- Bottom-left cinematic hero uses full-screen video, content bottom-left, controlled max-width, and directional gradients.
- Centered SaaS/app video hero uses centered headline, tagline pill, dual CTA, and transparent overlay navigation.
- Two-panel Liquid Glass split hero uses left narrative around 52% and right information cluster around 48%, with right panel hidden on mobile.
- Technical education HLS hero uses HLS video, vertical grid, SVG glow, floating glass info card, and uppercase technical headline.
- Strict grayscale hero uses no colored accents and relies on opacity hierarchy, material, typography, and spacing.

AI summary: Premium video hero layout system for landing page, SaaS homepage, portfolio first screen, app launch, and cinematic product websites. Choose a composition model before coding: top-aligned campaign, bottom-left poster, MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, two-panel Liquid Glass, technical education HLS, or strict grayscale glass. Includes video layer, typography, CTA, nav, mobile menu, overlays, and information clusters.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Interaction States

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium video hero, landing page opening, SaaS homepage hero, portfolio first screen, cinematic product website, app launch page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- MP4 video uses autoPlay, loop, muted, playsInline, object-cover, absolute inset-0, and z-0.
- Content sits above video at z-10 or z-20; navbar sits above at z-20 to z-50.
- CTA hover uses restrained scale-105; active uses scale-95.
- Mobile hamburger opens a functional full-screen dark overlay menu.
- Video readability must be checked before omitting overlays.
- Reduced-motion mode should use static poster or reduced video emphasis.

AI summary: Premium video hero layout system for landing page, SaaS homepage, portfolio first screen, app launch, and cinematic product websites. Choose a composition model before coding: top-aligned campaign, bottom-left poster, MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, two-panel Liquid Glass, technical education HLS, or strict grayscale glass. Includes video layer, typography, CTA, nav, mobile menu, overlays, and information clusters.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium video hero, landing page opening, SaaS homepage hero, portfolio first screen, cinematic product website, app launch page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Do not place white text directly over bright video areas without gradient support.
- Do not rely on video content as the only value proposition.
- Use muted autoplay video only; never autoplay audio.
- Mobile menus must be keyboard reachable and dismissible.
- Check CTA contrast against video and overlays.
- Avoid rapid motion behind long reading content.

AI summary: Premium video hero layout system for landing page, SaaS homepage, portfolio first screen, app launch, and cinematic product websites. Choose a composition model before coding: top-aligned campaign, bottom-left poster, MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, two-panel Liquid Glass, technical education HLS, or strict grayscale glass. Includes video layer, typography, CTA, nav, mobile menu, overlays, and information clusters.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium video hero, landing page opening, SaaS homepage hero, portfolio first screen, cinematic product website, app launch page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Recommended hero models: top-aligned cinematic, bottom-left cinematic, full-screen MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, strict grayscale Liquid Glass, two-panel Liquid Glass split, and technical education HLS.
- Top-aligned campaign typography can use Rubik or strong geometric sans, uppercase, bold, text-6xl mobile, text-8xl tablet, around 100px desktop, line-height 0.98, letter-spacing -2px to -4px.
- Bottom-left hero z-index: video z-0, overlay z-5, content z-10 or z-20, navbar z-50.
- MP4 background video requires autoPlay, loop, muted, playsInline, absolute inset-0, w-full, h-full, object-cover, z-0.
- Directional overlays are better than a single generic black overlay: left text uses left-to-right gradient, bottom text uses bottom-up gradient, centered text uses radial or central contrast layer.

AI summary: Premium video hero layout system for landing page, SaaS homepage, portfolio first screen, app launch, and cinematic product websites. Choose a composition model before coding: top-aligned campaign, bottom-left poster, MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, two-panel Liquid Glass, technical education HLS, or strict grayscale glass. Includes video layer, typography, CTA, nav, mobile menu, overlays, and information clusters.
